flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Johnson C Smith University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (26.7% → 21.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Johnson C Smith University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.9k → $21.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Johnson C Smith University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.9k → $21.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Johnson C Smith University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (39.0% → 34.3%).
